info.title: ValueSets Enumeration API
info.description: API endpoint providing an enumeration of all available ValueSet schemas

get.summary: Get enumeration of all ValueSet schemas
get.description: Returns a list of all available ValueSet schemas with metadata

schemas.title: Ethiopian Patient Gender values Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for Ethiopian Patient Gender values ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

schemas.title: Ethiopia Education Status ValueSet Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for Ethiopia Education Status ValueSet ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

schemas.title: Ethiopia State / Region ValueSet Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for Ethiopia State / Region ValueSet ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

schemas.title: Ethiopia Occupation ValueSet Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for Ethiopia Occupation ValueSet ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

schemas.title: Ethiopian Patient Marital Status values Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for Ethiopian Patient Marital Status values ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

schemas.title: Preferred Contact Method Value Set Schema
schemas.description: JSON Schema for Preferred Contact Method Value Set ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

EnumerationResponse.title: ValueSet Enumeration Schema
EnumerationResponse.description: JSON Schema defining the structure of the ValueSet enumeration endpoint response

url.description: Relative URL to the schema file

valueSetUrl.description: FHIR canonical URL of the ValueSet

codeCount.description: Number of codes in the ValueSet
